# Nonbank

> Nonbank is a hybrid DeFi wallet with a seamlessly integrated custodial Visa debit card (NON×CARD). Users hold their own keys in a non-custodial wallet and can spend crypto directly through a Visa card issued under a Kolo issuer partnership, available in 100+ countries. Key differentiators: gasless transactions, built-in AML Watchtower, and a single app that bridges DeFi and card spending.

## Key Facts

- **Product:** Hybrid DeFi wallet + integrated custodial Visa card (NON×CARD)
- **Custody model:** Non-custodial wallet (user holds keys) + custodial card (Kolo issuer)
- **Platforms:** iOS, Android, Web
- **Card coverage:** 100+ countries (EU, APAC, LATAM, Central Asia, Middle East). Excludes TUR, ISR, CHN, IND, US.
- **Language/geo strategy:** English-global — Nonbank is a borderless DeFi wallet, not a country-matrixed CeFi product.
- **Chains:** TRON today; EVM planned.
- **Assets:** TRX, USDT (TRC-20), BTC (via bridge), ETH (planned).
- **Website:** https://nonbank.io

## Core Differentiators

1. **Gasless fees** — send crypto without holding native gas tokens (no ETH or TRX required); fees are deducted from the transfer amount.
2. **Built-in AML Watchtower** — automatic screening and blocking of transfers from sanctioned wallets and suspicious entities. Compliance-first self-custody.
3. **Hybrid DeFi wallet + card** — non-custodial wallet and custodial Visa card live in the same app. Users don't move funds to an exchange to spend.
4. **Proxy addresses & watch wallets** — monitor any wallet via watch-only addresses; proxy addresses for privacy.
5. **NON ID** — a DeFi identity handle for receiving funds, mintable as an NFT.

## Use Cases

- Self-custody DeFi users who want to spend holdings without moving to a custodial exchange
- Users who hold USDT on TRON and want to transact without sourcing TRX for gas
- Compliance-conscious crypto users who want AML screening on incoming transfers
- Portfolio monitoring via watch-only addresses
- Everyday spending in 100+ countries via Visa acceptance

## Comparison with Competitors

| Feature | Nonbank | Gnosis Pay | MetaMask Card | COCA | Bleap | Crypto.com |
|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|
| Self-custody wallet | Yes | Yes (Safe) | Yes | Yes | Yes | No (custodial) |
| Integrated Visa card | Yes | Yes | Yes (via partner) | Yes | Yes | Yes |
| Gasless sends | Yes | No | No | Partial | No | N/A |
| Built-in AML screening | Yes | Partial | No | No | No | N/A (custodial) |
| Card country coverage | 100+ | EEA-focused | Limited regions | Growing | EEA-focused | 40+ |
| One app for wallet + card | Yes | Requires Safe + Gnosis Pay flow | Yes | Yes | Yes | Yes (custodial) |

- [Homepage](https://nonbank.io): Product overview and NON×CARD
- [Blog](https://nonbank.io/blog): Product updates, guides, DeFi/GEO content
